inverted-foreground-muted.$description: Solid composite of 72% white over inverted (neutral.900, #1c1a17), computed in encoded sRGB by `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs derive` — deterministic, no alpha in the token (INC-242).

inverted-accent.$description: On-dark accent for inverted surfaces — large-text/fill usage only, ≥ 3:1 non-text/large floor vs inverted; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-244).

code-foreground.$description: Default code text on the inverted code-block surface — 17.36:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 small-text floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251).

code-comment.$description: Syntax: comments — muted but 9.44:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 small-text floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251).

code-keyword.$description: Syntax: keywords — same primitive as inverted-accent but a distinct SMALL-TEXT contract: 8.52:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor (inverted-accent's own contract stays large/fill-only); proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251).

code-string.$description: Syntax: strings — warm gold, semantic-tier literal (`inverted-foreground-muted` precedent; INC-251's boundary excludes tokens/primitive/), 11.02:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251).

code-function.$description: Syntax: functions/constants — soft periwinkle, the palette's one deliberate cool counterpoint (syntax-only, not brand usage; ratified in INC-251 planning), 9.99:1 float vs inverted, ≥ 4.5:1 floor; proven in `scripts/contrast-proof.mjs prove` (INC-251).
